## What this changes

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] **Edge** — worker / connector / emit plugin / docs / example (PR + review + conformance)
- [ ] **Core** — language / contracts / plan hub (**requires an RFC** — link it below)

RFC / design discussion:

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — the DCO applies to every commit,
      including agent-authored ones (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)).
- [ ] Tests added or updated, and the relevant suite passes locally.
- [ ] `bash scripts/check-spdx.sh` is green (new source files carry the SPDX header).
- [ ] For an SPI contribution (worker/connector/plugin): conformance considered /
      the relevant conformance fixtures pass.
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in.
